tuning: E A D G B E
content:
transpose +1 for chords without capo


[Intro]
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
How I'm feeling, it doesn't matter[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
'Cause you know I'm okay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Instead, I ask myself, "Why do you worry?"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
When you know, you know I'm the same[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
I know, I know you don't love me, baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
They're trying to take you away from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
On  - ly over my dead bo   -   -   - dy[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
  I think I killed e'rybody[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
In the game last year, man, fuck it, I was on though[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  And I thought I found the girl of my dreams[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Dm7[/ch]
At a strip club, mmm-mmm, fuck it, I was wrong though[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Shout out to all my niggas living tax free[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Nowadays it's six figures when they tax me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
  Oh well, I guess you lose some and win some[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Long as the outcome is income[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
  You know I want it all and then some[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Shout out to Asian girls, let the lights dim some[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Shots came, I don't know where they was sent from[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Probably some bad hoes I'm 'bout to take the hint from[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
  Yeah, you know me well, nigga, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  I mean you ain't the only real nigga[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
They got me on these white women like Seal, nigga[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Slave to the pussy but I'm just playing the field, nigga, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  Are these people really discussing my career again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Asking if I'll be going platinum in a year again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
  Don't I got the shit the world wanna hear again?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                        [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Don't Michael Jordan still got his hoop earring in?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
  Man all of your flows bore me: paint drying[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  And I don't ever be trippin off of what ain't mine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  And I be hearing the shit you say through the grapevine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  But jealousy is just love and hate at the same time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
  Yeah, it's been that way from the beginning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  I just been playing, I ain't even notice I was winning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
  And this is the only sound you should fear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Man, these kids wear crowns over here and everything is all right[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Oh, I know you don't love me, baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
They're trying to take you away from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
On  - ly over my dead bo   -   -   - dy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  You say I'm old news, well who the new star?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Cause if I'm going anywhere, it's probably too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
  Just performed at a Bar Mitzvah over in the States[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Used half of the money to beat my brother's case[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Red wine over Fed time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  And shout out to the niggas that's doing dead time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
  Shout out to the bitches there when it's bedtime[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  And fuck you to the niggas that think it's their time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Yeah, don't make me take your life apart, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  You and whoever the fuck gave you your start boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
  Oh, you wanna be a motherfucking funny guy?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Don't make me break your Kevin Hart, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
  Yeah, it's whatever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  You know, feeling good, living better[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  I think maybe I was numb to it last year[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  But you know I feel it now more than ever[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
  My city love me like Mac Dre in the Bay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  Second album, I'm back paving the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  The backpackers are back on the bandwagon[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Like this was my comeback season back, back in the day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  And I met your baby moms last night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  We took a picture together, I hope she frames it![/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
  And I was drinking at the Palms last night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
  And ended up losing everything that I came with[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
  Yeah, feel like I've been here before, huh?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7[/ch]
   I still got ten years to go, huh?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
  And this is the only sound you should fear[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Man, these kids wear crowns over here and everything is all right[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Oh, I know you don't love me, baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]
They're trying to take you away from me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]
On  - ly over my dead bo   -   -   - dy[/tab]


[Outro]
